fields.name: Ripple Breathing
fields.description: +1d to resist poison, fatigue, or fear. Once per score, push yourself with no stress cost.

fields.name: Ripple Infusion
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to imbue an object with Ripple energy for the scene. Gains +1 effect vs vampires and pillarmen.

fields.name: Scarlet Overdrive
fields.description: Ignite a weapon or limb. Inflicts a fire-based secondary effect. Foes must resist or catch fire.

fields.name: Zoom Punch
fields.description: Make a melee strike at one Range grade beyond your Stand’s operational Range. +1d when attacking from unexpected angles or cover.

fields.name: Sendō Overdrive
fields.description: Strike bizarre targets through walls or barriers within your operational Range. On a 6, begin a "Contact Clock" (4 ticks) to bypass cover entirely.

fields.name: Metal Silver Overdrive
fields.description: Ripple conducts through metallic weapons. +1 effect when using chains, blades, or wire tools.

fields.name: Ripple Hypnosis
fields.description: Once per score, with skin contact, suggest a command or surface a forgotten memory. Target resists with Resolve.

fields.name: Ripple Chain
fields.description: Imbue rope or chain. Functions as a melee weapon or restraint tool. +1d when entangling.

fields.name: Age Resistance
fields.description: Once per session, ignore 1 fatigue, aging, or time-based consequence.

fields.name: Life Magnetism Overdrive
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to shape plant matter into a glider, cloak, or shield. +1 effect on movement or defense.

fields.name: Scarlet Shield
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor. Enemies who make physical contact with you take Level 1 Harm unless they resist.

fields.name: Stand on Water
fields.description: Gain stable footing over liquid, mist, or unstable surfaces for 1 scene. +1 position in terrain-based actions.

fields.name: Tornado Overdrive
fields.description: Perform a high-speed rotational dive. Break through cover or brittle surfaces. +1d when clearing minions or performing crowd control actions.

fields.name: Ripple Sentinel
fields.description: Always aware of undead or bizarre presence within your immediate presence. Doesn’t require an action.

fields.name: Wall Pulse
fields.description: You can run across vertical surfaces. +1d on movement rolls when climbing or jumping.

fields.name: Vital Transfer
fields.description: Once per score, lower 1 Harm level from an ally. On a crit, lower 2 Harm levels.

fields.name: Dispel Harmonics
fields.description: Once per score, cancel one magical, bizarre, or spiritual effect in your zone.

fields.name: Aura Lock
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to suppress ability activation within your operational Range until the target pushes themselves or the fiction shifts. Targets resist with Resolve.

fields.name: Guided Overdrive
fields.description: Ripple arcs from your primary target to a second target within your operational Range. The second target takes splash damage.

fields.name: Hamon Blade
fields.description: Ripple weapons ignore 1 armor or resistance.

fields.name: Deep Pass Overdrive
fields.description: Sacrifice all remaining stress to fully heal an ally. This cannot be interrupted.

fields.name: Solar Infusion
fields.description: Spend 2 stress to supercharge an object or weapon. +2 effect on the next action using that object.

fields.name: Scarlet Wreath
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor to gain 2 extra armor for 1 scene. Glows visibly.

fields.name: Solar Rejection
fields.description: Reflect radiant or flame-based attacks back toward their source. +1 effect on the redirect.

fields.name: Pulse Detonation
fields.description: Channel stored Ripple into an AoE knockdown within your operational Range. Fill a 4-tick "Crowd Disruption" clock.

fields.name: Final Flame
fields.description: When you would be taken out, you may spend 2 stress to take one final action with +2 effect. You fall unconscious immediately after.

fields.name: Heavenly Discipline
fields.description: Ignore all fatigue-based consequences. Your breathing is flawless.

fields.name: Solar Gate
fields.description: Once per campaign, completely disintegrate a construct or undead within your immediate presence.

fields.name: Sacred Overdrive
fields.description: Once per score, spend 2 stress to make one Hamon strike that bypasses all resistances and defenses.

fields.name: Hamon Messiah
fields.description: Once per score, allow an ally to channel their Hamon through your body or weapons.

fields.name: Pulse Domination
fields.description: When you land a successful Hamon strike, the target must push themselves or make a resistance roll before they can activate their next special ability.

fields.name: Bubble Launcher
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to fire a barrage of Hamon-charged bubbles within your operational Range. You may detonate them at will.

fields.name: Ripple Hair Attack
fields.description: Harden hair or fabric to deflect projectiles. Once per scene, reduce incoming Harm by 1 level. Your armor is the hardened material itself — expend it to negate rather than reduce if needed.

fields.name: Scarf Sensor
fields.description: Your scarf vibrates with ambient changes. +1d to resist surprise, ambush, or sudden environmental effects.

fields.name: Bubble Cutter
fields.description: Spinning bubbles with razor edges. Ignore 1 armor on thrown attacks. +1 effect on "Slice" or disarm clocks.

fields.name: Bubble Barrier
fields.description: Create one large bubble barrier within your immediate presence. Absorbs 1 attack (up to Level 2 Harm). Begins a 4-tick "Containment" clock if attacked.

fields.name: Bubble Lenses
fields.description: Bubbles can magnify or reflect light within your operational Range. Begin a 4-tick "Blinded" clock if shined into a target’s eyes.

fields.name: Sound-Reactive Ripple
fields.description: +1d to attacks synchronized to rhythm, speech, or music. Once per scene, cause a "Beat Drop" (3-tick distraction clock).

fields.name: Aerial Float
fields.description: Use a scarf or bubble glider to slow a fall or drift over unstable terrain. +1 position on movement rolls while airborne.

fields.name: Bubble Cutter Gliding
fields.description: Launch homing slicer bubbles. Track a target up to your operational Range away.

fields.name: Chain Ambush
fields.description: Use a Ripple-infused scarf to grapple or disarm from hiding. +1d to stealth-based attacks or reactions.

fields.name: Elastic Rebound
fields.description: Once per scene, bounce off terrain or enemies to reposition. Gain +1 effect on your next action.

fields.name: Echo Feint
fields.description: Leave behind a reflective bubble afterimage within your immediate presence. The next attack against you targets the illusion instead.

fields.name: Elemental Shift
fields.description: +1 effect when fighting in terrain dominated by a specific element (fog, water, fire, ice). Ripple adapts to the environment.

fields.name: Trapwork
fields.description: Create a tripwire or cage trap using Ripple-infused tools within your operational Range. Fill a 4-tick "Ensnare" clock on setup.

fields.name: Bubble Tracker
fields.description: Tag a target with a glowing bubble. You always know their location within A-rank Range (100ft) until the bubble is destroyed or they push themselves to remove it.

fields.name: Smoke Spiral
fields.description: Spin a small object into a smoke cloud within your immediate presence. Starts a 3-tick "Choke or Cover" clock.

fields.name: Ripple Magnet
fields.description: Once per scene, call a small Ripple-infused object to your hand from within your line of sight.

fields.name: Bubble Laser Grid
fields.description: Set up a refracted beam field within your operational Range. Targets caught unaware take Level 3 Harm. +1d on setup rolls.

fields.name: Hamon Mirage
fields.description: Use bubble refraction to hide your location or identity until you attack, take Harm, or the fiction exposes you. Attacks against you have -1d. On a crit, gain +1 effect on your next misdirected action.

fields.name: Overclocked Pop
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to burst multiple bubbles simultaneously. Affects all targets within your immediate presence.

fields.name: Vacuum Cage
fields.description: Trap a foe inside a sealed bubble within your operational Range. Begins a 4-tick "Suffocation" clock. Target may resist to break free.

fields.name: Reflection Pulse
fields.description: Bounce an attack or ability through three or more bubble surfaces. +1 effect or redirect the trajectory. Requires pre-positioned surfaces.

fields.name: Tactile Map
fields.description: Use bubbles to physically map a space or reveal unseen terrain within your operational Range. +1 effect on navigation, escape, or hidden object rolls.

fields.name: Hamon Kite
fields.description: Fly or coast across open space or falling terrain. +1 position on chase or fall rolls.

fields.name: Trick Bubble
fields.description: Store an attack or effect in a bubble. Declare a condition now — the effect triggers when that condition is met.

fields.name: Pulse Core
fields.description: You do not breathe — generate Ripple internally. +1 effect in gas, underwater, or vacuum environments.

fields.name: Auto-Filter
fields.description: Immune to airborne toxins, diseases, or choking hazards. Always succeed at resisting chemical or suffocation effects.

fields.name: Shockline
fields.description: Ripple discharges as electricity. +1 effect against mechanical targets and armored enemies. On a crit, start a 4-tick "System Disruption" clock.

fields.name: Neural Sync
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to seize control or short out a nearby machine within your immediate presence. Roll Tinker or Command to determine precision.

fields.name: Static Field
fields.description: When struck in melee, you may expend your Stand armor to deal Level 1 Harm to the attacker.

fields.name: Magnetic Grapple
fields.description: Attract or repel metal objects or cybernetic foes within C-rank Range (40ft). +1d to mobility or disarming actions.

fields.name: Cybernetic Conduction
fields.description: Ripple transmits through any conductive material. You may target enemies through circuitry, pipelines, or speaker systems anywhere within your operational Range.

fields.name: Pulse Feedback
fields.description: After taking Harm, gain +1 effect on your next physical action. Once per scene.

fields.name: Emergency Coil
fields.description: Deploy internal coils to gain 1 temporary armor for the scene. Costs 1 stress if used reactively after a consequence is declared.

fields.name: Phantom Pulse
fields.description: Activate a device or strike a target through walls using ambient Ripple within your operational Range. Roll Tinker or Finesse.

fields.name: Overclocked Ripple
fields.description: Spend 3 stress to increase the potency of your next Hamon ability. On a crit, apply a 4-tick "Residual Heat" or "Feedback Burn" clock to the target.

fields.name: EMP Burst
fields.description: Once per score, disable all tech within your immediate presence. Starts a 5-tick "Blackout" clock. You are immune to this effect.

fields.name: Spin-Ripple Bridge
fields.description: Interface with a Spin-infused device or Stand projection using your internal circuitry. Treat as Consort or Tinker.

fields.name: Charged Leap
fields.description: Use magnetic propulsion to leap up to your operational Range or crash through obstacles. +1 effect on mobility or forced entry actions.

fields.name: Chain Pulse
fields.description: Ripple arcs through 2–3 conductive targets within your operational Range.

fields.name: Synthetic Aura
fields.description: Generate a false supernatural aura. +1d to pass as undead, bizarre, or magical. Once per scene.

fields.name: Circuit Burn
fields.description: Disable an enemy’s gear or weapon until they push themselves to reactivate it. Costs 2 stress if the target is high-tech or Relic-class.

fields.name: Reactive Musculature
fields.description: Once per scene, reroll a failed Prowess roll. On a crit, gain +1 effect.

fields.name: Pulse Mirror
fields.description: Record a minor visual or sound signal. Replay it once per score as a distraction or forgery.

fields.name: Breathless Overdrive
fields.description: Your Ripple ignores environmental limits. For one scene, all your Hamon abilities gain +1 effect and cannot be suppressed.

fields.name: Electric Soul
fields.description: Transfer Ripple energy into a Stand or ally within C-rank Range (40ft). They gain +1d on their next action. Costs 1 stress.

fields.name: Thermal Control
fields.description: Superheat or supercool any surface within your immediate presence. +1 effect when breaching, disabling, or damaging tech.

fields.name: Wave Recorder
fields.description: Store one ability or Stand signature you’ve witnessed. Replay it once, narratively or tactically.

fields.name: Dark Drive
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to let an ally reroll their next failed roll.

fields.name: Power Sink
fields.description: Interrupt a magical or tech ability mid-use within your operational Range. Target must resist or lose the effect entirely.

fields.name: Pulse Chainstorm
fields.description: Strike up to 5 tech-tagged enemies within your operational Range with Level 1 Harm. Costs 2 stress.

fields.name: Synthetic Savior
fields.description: Spend 3 stress to stabilize a dying ally within your immediate presence immediately. Clears 1 Level 3 Harm. Once per score.

fields.name: Blood Freeze
fields.description: Touch attack slows blood flow. Target cannot move without pushing themselves. On a crit, start a 4-tick "Crystallization" clock — on completion, they are fully immobilized until someone spends a downtime action to treat them or a clock is cleared to break them free.

fields.name: Breathless Shell
fields.description: You no longer breathe. Immune to smoke, gas, drowning, or vacuum. +1 effect in cold environments.

fields.name: Shadow Pulse
fields.description: Emit an aura that snuffs light and distorts senses. +1d to Prowl in dim or dark areas.

fields.name: Frozen Grip
fields.description: Spend 1 stress to freeze a limb on contact. Target must resist or lose use of it — they must push themselves to use that limb until they clear a 4-tick "Thaw" clock.

fields.name: Crystallize Aura
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor to encase yourself in frost. Gain 1 additional armor for one scene.

fields.name: Chillwave
fields.description: Once per score, emit a cold burst within your immediate presence. All enemies present must resist or take -1d to their next action.

fields.name: Aura Extinguish
fields.description: Spend 3 stress to suppress all auras (Stands, Spin, Hamon) within your immediate presence until the targets push themselves or the fiction shifts. Targets may resist individually.

fields.name: Dark Mirror
fields.description: Once per score, reflect a light or energy-based attack back toward its source. Roll Finesse or Resolve.

fields.name: Grave Pulse
fields.description: Touch a corpse or undead to reanimate it briefly. It acts for one action under your direction, then crumbles.

fields.name: Frost Magnetism
fields.description: Pull blood-bearing targets within C-rank Range (40ft) toward you. Costs 1 stress.

fields.name: Frostbite Lash
fields.description: Your unarmed attacks deal +1 Harm and start a 2-tick "Frozen Wound" clock. Once per scene.

fields.name: Ebon Mist
fields.description: Melt into vapor for 1 scene. Travel through vents, bars, or cracks. Cannot attack in this form.

fields.name: Cracking Silence
fields.description: Mute all sound within your immediate presence. +1d to stealth or escape actions.

fields.name: Soul Leech
fields.description: When you take out a foe with Dark Resonance, regain 2 stress. Once per score.

fields.name: Frozen Veil
fields.description: Gain a temporary frost armor that absorbs Level 1 Harm. Breaks after use.

fields.name: Shadow Chain
fields.description: Bind two targets within your immediate presence together. They share stress or Harm until they resist or physically separate.

fields.name: Absolute Zero Overdrive
fields.description: Spend 3 stress to freeze all enemies within your immediate presence. Creates a 6-tick "Escape the Ice" clock. Cannot be used again until next downtime.

fields.name: Curse Pulse
fields.description: Nullify all healing or regeneration effects on one target within your immediate presence until they push themselves to recover. Requires physical contact.

fields.name: Tombstorm
fields.description: Unleash a cold black fog that obscures vision across the entire scene. Costs 2 stress.

fields.name: Deathless Core
fields.description: When you would be taken out, spend 2 stress to remain standing for one final action. You fall unconscious after.

fields.name: Void Echo
fields.description: Erase one short-term memory from a target within your immediate presence. They forget a scene or fact of your choice.

fields.name: Frost Frame
fields.description: Encapsulate a Stand or projection within your immediate presence in ice. Target must resist or push themselves before they can act.

fields.name: Winter Monologue
fields.description: While monologuing, enemies within your immediate presence must push themselves to interrupt or act against you.

fields.name: Black Ripple Ascension
fields.description: Become fully undead for one scene. Immune to radiant and light-based effects.

fields.name: Frozen Fate
fields.description: When you would take fatal Harm, encase yourself in ice instead. Avoid all damage. Once per score.

fields.name: Vital Bloom
fields.description: Touch a plant to trigger massive, unnatural growth. Creates cover, distraction, or difficult terrain within your immediate presence.

fields.name: Beast Pulse
fields.description: +1d to Consort or Command with beasts.

fields.name: Floral Barrier
fields.description: Expend your Stand armor to grow a plant shield that absorbs up to 2 Harm. Breaks on use.

fields.name: Ripple Pollination
fields.description: Mark enemies or zones within your operational Range with scented pollen. Tracked for 1 scene. +1d to find or ambush tagged targets.

fields.name: Amphibious Overdrive
fields.description: +1 effect on rolls made in aquatic, swamp, or humid environments.

fields.name: Root Snare
fields.description: Create an entangling trap within your operational Range. On a hit, starts a 4-tick "Escape the Vines" clock.

fields.name: Natural Camouflage
fields.description: Blend into organic terrain. +1d to Prowl. On a crit, become undetectable by bizarre means until you act or the fiction exposes you.

fields.name: Thermal Resonance
fields.description: Detect heat, heartbeat, or intent within your immediate presence. +1 effect to Survey or Study actions.

fields.name: Photosynthetic Boost
fields.description: In direct sunlight, gain +1 effect to Skirmish, Finesse, and Wreck actions.

fields.name: Beast Sync
fields.description: Link senses with a creature. Share hearing, sight, or scent for 1 scene.

fields.name: Ripple Burrow
fields.description: Travel underground or through soft terrain up to your operational Range. Push yourself to extend beyond that.

fields.name: Toxin Pulse
fields.description: Your next attack delivers a paralytic. Starts a 4-tick "Poisoned" clock unless resisted.

fields.name: Echo Howl
fields.description: Release a primal scream. Nearby animals within your operational Range either rally as temporary allies or flee — GM decides based on the fiction.

fields.name: Floral Smokescreen
fields.description: Emit pollen, petals, or spores. Obscures a zone within your operational Range until the wind shifts or the scene moves on.

fields.name: Chameleon Skin
fields.description: Become invisible in natural terrain. Breaks when you attack or take Harm.

fields.name: Sap from the Past
fields.description: Touch a tree or coral. Replay ambient sound or emotion from earlier that day.

fields.name: Symbiotic Revival
fields.description: Spend 2 stress to stabilize and revive a dying ally within your immediate presence. They return with Level 1 Harm cleared.

fields.name: Photosynthetic Armor
fields.description: In sunlight, recover 1 stress or gain 1 armor at the end of each of your actions.

fields.name: Tremor Sense
fields.description: Feel all movement within your operational Range through terrain. +1d to detect stealth or vibration-based triggers.

fields.name: Mycelial Whisper
fields.description: Speak silently to allies via roots, spores, or currents. Distance is no barrier as long as you share connected terrain.

fields.name: Animal Swarm
fields.description: Summon dozens of small creatures within your operational Range. Targets must resist or be distracted or disarmed.

fields.name: Seed Pulse
fields.description: Plant a Ripple-charged seed within your operational Range. If an enemy triggers it, they become entangled — they must push themselves or clear a 4-tick "Root Grip" clock to move.

fields.name: Pulse Graft
fields.description: Temporarily merge a natural trait (bark, toxin, root system) into an object or ally for 1 scene. +1 effect on the next relevant use.

fields.name: Rewild
fields.description: Take over a massive plant or animal within your operational Range for 1 scene. It acts as a Tier 2+ minion (6-segment clock).

fields.name: Natural Archive
fields.description: Ask one question about the past from the terrain you’re touching. The GM must answer truthfully.

fields.name: Adaptive Bloom
fields.description: Your Ripple takes on elemental traits (ice, acid, flame) for one scene. This effect is more potent against opponents vulnerable to those traits.

fields.name: Nature’s Cloak
fields.description: An ally within your immediate presence becomes undetectable by bizarre or machine senses until they act or the fiction exposes them. Costs 1 stress.

fields.name: Harmonic Overrun
fields.description: Spend 3 stress to animate all natural terrain in the scene as Tier 3+ allies (8-segment clock). Lasts until the clock fills or the scene moves on.
